money_flow_summary: Money flows from enterprises and developers to AI platform providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) via API usage, then from those platforms to the compute layer (NVIDIA, cloud providers). The solo-operator opportunity sits in the middle: building AI-powered products and services that capture the value between commodity AI APIs and end business users who don't know how to use them.

top_opportunities.title: AI Voice Agent for Inbound Business Calls (Specific Vertical)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a voice AI agent using Vapi/Retell + Claude/GPT-4o that answers inbound calls for a specific business type (dental offices, home service companies, restaurants). Agent books appointments, answers FAQs, takes orders, and escalates only when needed. Charge $199-$999/mo flat or $0.10/min. Every missed call is a lost customer — restaurants miss 60%+ of lunch reservation calls.
top_opportunities.moat: Business phone system integration creates high switching cost; industry-specific knowledge base improves over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Vapi agent with dental booking workflow; integrate with Google Calendar API for availability; cold-call 20 dental offices with live demo
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: Voice AI handles 100% of routine inbound calls 24/7 — answering the phone at 11 PM when the office is closed and booking the next morning's appointment automatically

top_opportunities.title: AI QA Testing Agent for Web & Mobile Apps
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI agent that takes a URL or app, explores it autonomously like a QA tester, identifies bugs and UX issues, and generates a structured bug report with screenshots and reproduction steps. Charge dev teams $99-$499/mo for continuous testing on every commit. Replaces 1-2 days of manual QA per sprint.
top_opportunities.moat: CI/CD integration creates workflow dependency; test history database compounds value over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Playwright-based AI agent using Claude's computer use API; test on 5 open-source apps; post demo video on Twitter/X
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI explores the UI like a human tester — clicking through flows, testing edge cases, and identifying usability bugs — not just regression-testing predetermined paths

top_opportunities.title: AI API Cost Optimizer (Multi-Model Routing Layer)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an LLM router that analyzes each incoming prompt and routes it to the cheapest model that can handle it: simple queries → Haiku/Flash, complex reasoning → Sonnet/GPT-4o, code → DeepSeek Coder. Charge either a flat $99-$499/mo SaaS fee or 5% of savings generated. Companies spending $10k/mo on AI APIs often can reduce costs 40-60% through routing.
top_opportunities.moat: Usage data creates routing optimization that improves over time; OpenRouter/Portkey already exist but are generic — vertical-specific versions have better routing accuracy
top_opportunities.first_step: Build a prompt classifier + routing layer using 5 models; test on 1,000 real prompts; publish cost savings benchmark comparing to single-model approach
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: The entire product IS an AI system making real-time decisions about which AI to use — a meta-AI agent that optimizes AI spending

top_opportunities.title: Computer Vision Inventory Counter for Retail/Restaurants
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an app where a restaurant or retail employee walks the storeroom with their phone, takes a 30-second video, and AI automatically counts every item, compares to par levels, and generates a purchase order. Charge $149-$499/mo. Replaces 2-3 hours/week of manual inventory counting. Target the 1M+ restaurants and 3M+ small retailers in the US.
top_opportunities.moat: Product catalog (with custom item recognition per business) creates switching cost; accuracy improves with more training data per customer
top_opportunities.first_step: Build mobile video capture + YOLO/Vision API item counting pipeline; test with 1 local restaurant; produce ROI calculator showing time/cost savings
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI recognizes thousands of different products from video in seconds — what previously required expensive RFID tags or 2+ hours of manual counting
